title: STAT+: Gilead to buy Arcellx in nearly $8B deal
description: Gilead Sciences is buying Arcellx in a deal worth $7.8 billion, picking up its partner on a CAR-T therapy for multiple myeloma.
content: Gilead Sciences is buying Arcellx in a deal worth $7.8 billion, picking up its partner on a CAR-T therapy for multiple myeloma.
